ddls:
CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division (e.g., U-6, U-8, U-10) */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of players in the division */,
  "recommended_minutes" TEXT /* Recommended practice time range for the division */,
  "max_minutes" INTEGER /* Maximum practice time allowed for the division */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed in a team within this division */,
  "max_practices_august" INTEGER /* Maximum number of practices allowed in August */,
  "max_practices_after_opening" INTEGER /* Maximum number of practices allowed after the opening game */,
  "num_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in this division */,
  "rules_and_regulations" TEXT /* Specific rules and regulations for the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division the team belongs to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach responsible for the team */,
  "num_players" INTEGER /* Current number of players in the team */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team's uniform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Any coaching certifications held by the coach */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "position" TEXT /* Player's primary position on the field */,
  "skills_rating" INTEGER /* A rating of the player's skills (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "injuries" TEXT /* A history of any injuries the player has had */,
  "development_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the player's development and progress */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent or guardian of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES parents ("parent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parents" (
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent or guardian */,
  "parent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the parent or guardian */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the parent or guardian */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the parent or guardian */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the parent or guardian */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship to the player (e.g., mother, father, guardian) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "practices" (
  "practice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each practice session */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team participating in the practice */,
  "practice_date" TEXT /* Date of the practice session */,
  "practice_time" TEXT /* Time of the practice session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the practice session */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the practice session */,
  "coach_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the coach about the practice session */,
  "attendance_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if attendance is mandatory for this practice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("practice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_practices_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team participating in the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "score_team" INTEGER /* Score of the team */,
  "score_opponent" INTEGER /* Score of the opposing team */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee for the game */,
  "coach_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the coach about the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "practice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the practice session (if applicable) */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game (if applicable) */,
  "attended" INTEGER /* Whether the player attended the practice or game */,
  "reason_for_absence" TEXT /* Reason for absence (if applicable) */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of the attendance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_practice_id FOREIGN KEY ("practice_id") REFERENCES practices ("practice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, coach, parent) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level (e.g., 1 for admin, 2 for coach, 3 for parent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
